heading: Documentation of qualified service
label: 11203 Documentation of qualified service
notes: References in TextSection 401(a)(1)(B) of the GI Bill Improvement Act of 1977, referred to in subsec. (c), is , which is set out as a note under , Veterans’ Benefits.section 401(a)(1)(B) of Pub. L. 95–202section 106 of Title 38

Amendments2021—, substituted “an individual” for “a person” in subsecs. (a)(1) and (d).Pub. L. 116–283, § 8505(b)(13)(A)Subsec. (a)(2). , substituted “that individual” for “that person”.Pub. L. 116–283, § 8505(b)(13)(B)
amendments: Amendments2021—, substituted “an individual” for “a person” in subsecs. (a)(1) and (d).Pub. L. 116–283, § 8505(b)(13)(A)Subsec. (a)(2). , substituted “that individual” for “that person”.Pub. L. 116–283, § 8505(b)(13)(B)

children.text: issue a certificate of honorable service to an individual who, as determined by that Secretary, engaged in qualified service of a nature and duration that warrants issuance of the certificate; and

correct, or request the appropriate official of the Federal Government to correct, the service records of that individual to the extent necessary to reflect the qualified service and the issuance of the certificate of honorable service.

children.heading: .—Timing of Documentation
children.label: b .—Timing of Documentation
children.text: A Secretary receiving an application under subsection (a) shall act on the application not later than 1 year after the date of that receipt.

children.heading: .—Standards Relating to Service
children.label: c .—Standards Relating to Service
children.text: In making a determination under subsection (a)(1), the Secretary acting on the application shall apply the same standards relating to the nature and duration of service that apply to the issuance of honorable discharges under section 401(a)(1)(B) of the GI Bill Improvement Act of 1977 ( note).38 U.S.C. 106

children.heading: .—Correction of Records
children.label: d .—Correction of Records
children.text: An official who is requested under subsection (a)(2) to correct the service records of an individual shall make such correction.
